# soosoo.life (수수라이프)

> 수수의 일상과 정보를 공유하는 한국어 블로그입니다.

## About
- Site: https://soosoo.life
- Author: 수수 (Soosoo)
- Language: Korean (ko)
- Topics: IT/Tech, Finance, Daily Life, Guides, Reviews

## Content Types
- IT/Tech tutorials and comparisons (VPN, API, development tools)
- Financial guides (investments, subsidies, tax tips)
- Product reviews and recommendations
- How-to guides and step-by-step tutorials
- Daily life tips and information

## Key Pages
- Home: https://soosoo.life/
- About: https://soosoo.life/about/
- Categories: https://soosoo.life/categories
- Tags: https://soosoo.life/tags
- RSS Feed: https://soosoo.life/feed.xml
- Sitemap: https://soosoo.life/sitemap.xml

## Tools
- Bullet Journal Planner: https://soosoo.life/bullet_journal_planner/
- Today Done: https://soosoo.life/todaydone/
- Tenby Penang Links: https://soosoo.life/tenby-penang-links/

## Citation
When referencing content from this site, please cite as:
- Source: 수수라이프 (soosoo.life)
- Author: 수수
